GLASS_FANDANGO.ja: グラス・ファンダンゴ

PHIERAGGI.ja: 四丁拳銃『フィエラッジ』

SKULLOMANIAC.ja: スカル・オマニアック

WILD_DEFENSE_ALT.ja: ワイルドディフェンス

PENTAGRAM_DESC.en: Stays in hand, reducing in cost each turn. Deals massive damage.
PENTAGRAM_DESC.fr: Reste dans la main, réduisant son coût à chaque tour. Inflige des dégâts colossaux.
PENTAGRAM_DESC.it: Resta nella mano e riduce il suo costo a ogni turno. Infligge danni ingenti.
PENTAGRAM_DESC.de: Bleibt auf der Hand und wird jede Runde günstiger. Fügt extremen Schaden zu.
PENTAGRAM_DESC.es: Se queda en la mano y reduce el coste cada turno. Hace muchísimo daño.
PENTAGRAM_DESC.pt-BR: Permanece na mão, reduzindo em custo a cada turno. Causa muito dano.
PENTAGRAM_DESC.pl: Pozostaje na ręku, a koszt maleje z każdą kolejką. Zadaje potężne obrażenia.
PENTAGRAM_DESC.ru: Остаётся в руке, снижая стоимость с каждым ходом. Наносит колоссальный урон.
PENTAGRAM_DESC.ja: 手札に残り、ターンごとにコストが減少。さらに大ダメージを与える。
PENTAGRAM_DESC.ko: 손에 쥔 상태로 매 턴마다 비용이 감소합니다. 막대한 피해를 입힙니다.
PENTAGRAM_DESC.zh-Hant: 保留在手牌之中，消耗會逐回合降低。能夠造成高額的傷害。
PENTAGRAM_DESC.zh-Hans: 留在手牌中，每回合减少消耗。造成巨额伤害。

VICIOUS_HUNGER_DESC.fr: Peut transformer les ennemis en pièces.
VICIOUS_HUNGER_DESC.it: Può trasformare i nemici in monete.
VICIOUS_HUNGER_DESC.es: Puede que convierta a los enemigos en monedas.
VICIOUS_HUNGER_DESC.ja: 敵をコインに変えてしまう可能性あり。
VICIOUS_HUNGER_DESC.zh-Hant: 有機率能夠將敵人變成金幣。

MAGIC_WAND_DESC.it: Dà la priorità a chi attacca.
MAGIC_WAND_DESC.ja: 攻撃者を優先的に狙う。

PEACHONE_DESC.fr: Bombarde les ennemis après chaque tour.
PEACHONE_DESC.it: Bombarda i nemici a fine turno.
PEACHONE_DESC.de: Gegner werden am Ende einer Runde bombardiert.
PEACHONE_DESC.es: Bombardea a los enemigos tras todos los turnos.
PEACHONE_DESC.ja: ターン後に敵を爆撃する。
PEACHONE_DESC.zh-Hant: 每回合結束後轟炸敵人。

EBONY_WINGS_DESC.fr: Bombarde les ennemis après chaque tour.
EBONY_WINGS_DESC.it: Bombarda i nemici a fine turno.
EBONY_WINGS_DESC.de: Gegner werden am Ende einer Runde bombardiert.
EBONY_WINGS_DESC.es: Bombardea a los enemigos tras todos los turnos.
EBONY_WINGS_DESC.ja: ターン後に敵を爆撃する。
EBONY_WINGS_DESC.zh-Hant: 每回合結束後轟炸敵人。

SANTA_WATER_DESC.fr: Brûle les ennemis après ce tour.
SANTA_WATER_DESC.it: Ustiona i nemici dopo questo turno.
SANTA_WATER_DESC.de: Gegner erleiden am Ende der Runde Brandschaden.
SANTA_WATER_DESC.es: Quema a los enemigos tras este turno.
SANTA_WATER_DESC.ja: このターン後に敵を炎上させる。
SANTA_WATER_DESC.zh-Hant: 在本回合結束以後，燒盡敵人的罪孽。

LA_BORRA_DESC.fr: Brûle les ennemis après chaque tour.
LA_BORRA_DESC.it: Ustiona i nemici dopo ogni turno.
LA_BORRA_DESC.de: Gegner erleiden am Ende jeder Runde Brandschaden.
LA_BORRA_DESC.es: Quema a los enemigos tras todos los turnos.
LA_BORRA_DESC.ja: 毎ターン後に敵を炎上させる。
LA_BORRA_DESC.zh-Hant: 在每一回合結束以後，燃燼敵人的罪孽。

SILVER_RING_DESC.en: ({GlobalKeywords.Crawlers} stay longer and increased weapons hit additional times)

ROSARY_DESC.en: (Deal massive damage to the front row)
ROSARY_DESC.fr: (Inflige des dégâts colossaux au premier rang)
ROSARY_DESC.de: (Verursacht extremen Schaden bei der vordersten Reihe)
ROSARY_DESC.es: (Haces muchísimo daño a la primera fila)
ROSARY_DESC.pt-BR: (Causa muito dano à fileira da frente)
ROSARY_DESC.ja: （最前列に大ダメージを与える）
ROSARY_DESC.zh-Hant: （對前排的單位造成大量的傷害）

ANTONIO_SD.fr: Gagne {FccModifierValue:N0} % de {ModifyingStat} à chaque fois qu'une carte {CardType} est jouée.
ANTONIO_SD.it: Guadagni {FccModifierValue:N0}% {ModifyingStat} ogni volta che è giocata una carta {CardType}.
ANTONIO_SD.de: Du erhältst +{FccModifierValue:N0}% {ModifyingStat}, wenn du eine „{CardType}“-Karte ausspielst.
ANTONIO_SD.es: Ganas un {FccModifierValue:N0} % de {ModifyingStat} cada vez que se juega el tipo de carta {CardType}.
ANTONIO_SD.pt-BR: Ganhe {FccModifierValue:N0}% de {ModifyingStat} sempre que uma carta {CardType} for jogada.
ANTONIO_SD.pl: Otrzymuje {FccModifierValue:N0}% do: {ModifyingStat} po każdym zagraniu karty typu {CardType}.
ANTONIO_SD.ru: Повышает характеристику «{ModifyingStat}» на {FccModifierValue:N0}% за каждую разыгрываемую карту типа {CardType}.
ANTONIO_SD.ja: {CardType}がプレイされるたびに、{ModifyingStat}を{FccModifierValue:N0}%獲得する。
ANTONIO_SD.zh-Hant: 在你每次打出{CardType}卡牌後，可以獲得 {FccModifierValue:N0}% 的{ModifyingStat}加成。

ZIASSUNTA_SD.en: Gains Area, Duration and Might when playing cards.

KNIFE_L0.en: Fires quickly from right to left.

RUNETRACER_DESC.fr: Rebondit pour infliger des dégâts supplémentaires.
RUNETRACER_DESC.de: Prallt ab und verursacht so mehr Schaden.
RUNETRACER_DESC.pl: Odbija się, aby zadać więcej obrażeń.
RUNETRACER_DESC.ja: 跳ね返ると与えるダメージが増加。
RUNETRACER_DESC.zh-Hant: 反覆彈跳以造成更多的傷害。

GARLIC_L0.en: Damages front enemies. Chance to Knockback.

VICIOUS_HUNGER_L0.en: Evolved {db.Cards.Card_A_1_GattiAmari.Name}. May turn enemies into coins.

CARRELLO_L0.en: Throws a bouncing projectile. Number of bounces affected by Amount.

BLOODY_TEAR_L0.en: Evolution of the {db.Cards.Card_A_0_Whip.Name}. Can deal Critical damage and absorb HP.

GORGEOUS_MOON_L0.en: Erase 1 enemy. Keep using to increase power.

CROSS_L0.en: Damages enemies from the centre out.

SONG_OF_MANA_L0.en: Attack all enemies with a wave of mana. Create a {db.Cards.Card_B_0_RawMana.Name} card.

MANNAJJA_L0.en: Attack all enemies with a wave of mana. Create multiple {db.Cards.Card_B_0_RawMana.Name} cards.

HOLY_WAND_L0.en: Evolution of the {db.Cards.Card_A_1_MagicWand.Name}. Fires more projectiles.

VENTO_SACRO_L0.en: Attack quickly with high Critical strike chance.

FUWALAFUWALOO_L0.en: Union of {db.Cards.Card_A_3_VentoSacro.Name} and {db.Cards.Card_A_2_BloodyTear.Name}. Critical hits might generate explosions.

THUNDER_LOOP_L0.en: Strike all enemies twice with lightning.

HELLFIRE_L0.en: Evolved {db.Cards.Card_A_1_FireWand.Name}. Deals massive damage to a few enemies.

DEATH_SPIRAL_L0.en: Evolved {db.Cards.Card_A_3_Axe.Name}. Send an onslaught of scythes to kill the enemy.

SANTA_WATER_L0.en: Damages enemies at the end of this turn.

LA_BORRA_L0.en: Evolved {db.Cards.Card_A_3_SantaWater.Name}. Damages enemies at the end of every turn.

PEACHONE_L0.en: Orbits above, bombarding enemies between turns.

EBONY_WINGS_L0.en: Orbits above, bombarding enemies between turns.

ROSARY_L0.en: Deal massive damage to the front row.

CLOVER_PETAL_L0.en:
Increase Luck slightly. 
Draw a card

BRACER_L0.en: Draw additional cards at the start of your turn.

SILVER_RING_L0.en: Crawlers stay longer and weapons hit additional times.

FCC_ACTION_DESC.fr: {FccAction}, à chaque fois qu'une carte {TriggerType.Name} {TriggerType.Icon} est jouée.

CARD_UPGRADE_DESTROY_THRESHOLD.fr: Chances réduites de détruire les objets.
CARD_UPGRADE_DESTROY_THRESHOLD.ja: アイテム破壊率が減少。

ANTONIO_BIO.en: Armed with his trusty whip and a jawline that could cut garlic, Antonio is the boldest (and most accident-prone) of the monster-slaying Belpaeses. Unlike his ancestors, who had years of rigorous training, his primary qualifications include looking good in a billowy shirt and swinging wildly until the problem goes away. If anything takes him down, it’ll be his own stupidity—not the undead.

ARCA_BIO.en: Born from scandal, raised in spite, and dramatically brooding ever since, Arca clings to the idea that he’s of noble vampiric descent. His only proof? A filthy, barely legible note that smells suspiciously like pigsty. With a name that sounds important and firepower to match, he’s determined to burn his way to respect—one overcompensating fireball at a time.

CLERICI_BIO.en:
PLACEHOLDER
Clerici uses holy water! Its super effective!

GENNARO_BIO.en: Monster slayer? Sure. Monster business partner? If the price is right. Gennaro Belpaese may share his family’s knack for killing the undead, but he prefers a more… entrepreneurial approach. Armed with twin blades and an even sharper tongue, he’s just as likely to strike a deal as he is to strike a killing blow—whichever pays better.

IMELDA_BIO.en: Magic is dangerous, they said. It’s untrustworthy, they warned. Imelda heard all that—and promptly ignored it. While her family swings whips like it’s the Middle Ages, she prefers raining arcane destruction from a safe distance. Sure, she’s the black sheep, but when the undead come knocking, guess who suddenly loves a well-placed fireball?

LAMA_BIO.en: Raised by Porta, feared by everyone else, Lama Ladonna doesn’t just win battles—she ends them. A warrior of legendary skill and terrifying presence, her mere arrival on the battlefield has been known to make enemies lose their nerve… and their dignity. Those lucky enough to lack bowels might stand a chance. The rest? Well, they’d better hope she’s in a good mood.

MORTACCIO_BIO.en:
PLACEHOLDER
Mortaccio uses his own bones as weapons

POE_BIO.en: Poe has few friends not because he’s lacking in charm — though he is — but because his all-garlic diet makes him unbearable to be around. This has made him an unlikely, but highly efficient monster-hunter, with the ability to clear rooms faster than a warewolf at full moon. His pitiful, lonely life has led him to reflect on an inner strength others overlook. His defenses may seem weak, but they’re his greatest power, drawn from solitude to face any threat.

PORTA_BIO.en: From pigsty to power, Porta Ladonna never lets opportunity—or a foolish noble—go to waste. Clever, charming, and utterly ruthless, she used one romantic tryst to secure wealth, then promptly ditched the count to carve out her own empire. Some say she’s a gold-digger, but Porta prefers the term self-made woman—and she’s not carrying anyone who can’t keep up.

ZIASSUNTA_BIO.en:
PLACEHOLDER
Zi-Assunta has a sacred cup of coffee

RAMBA_BIO.en:
PLACEHOLDER
The ghost of an old lady who used to steal supermarket carts.
